message:
docs: Mark React hooks documentation integration complete

Update react-hooks-analysis-todo.md to reflect completion of documentation
integration task.

The React hooks dependency analysis capability has been successfully documented
in the project README under the JavaScript/TypeScript capabilities section,
with a clear bullet point describing the feature:
- "React hooks dependency analysis (useEffect/useCallback/useMemo)"

This completes the final verification task in the React hooks implementation
roadmap. All implementation, testing, and documentation tasks are now complete.

Final checklist status:
✅ Research & Planning
✅ Implementation (318 lines of AST + Python analysis)
✅ Fixtures & Tests (buggy + clean fixtures, 2 manifest cases)
✅ Verification & Follow-up (README integration, TODO tracking)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
